title: Luffy’s Rescue Becomes Possible
description: On pages 13–16, luffy’s rescue becomes possible focuses on Sanji, Kuroobi, Zoro, Hatchan as sanji, Zoro, and Usopp begin turning the battle around while Luffy’s rescue becomes the key to victory.
scene: On pages 13–16, luffy’s rescue becomes possible focuses on Sanji, Kuroobi, Zoro, Hatchan as sanji, Zoro, and Usopp begin turning the battle around while Luffy’s rescue becomes the key to victory.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...If I say I'm with Luffy and them, everyone will be killed...!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But if I say I'm with, Arlong, I can save all the villagers...!? A single word from me can decide the fate of all their lives...!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You rotten monster! You're still forcing Nami either way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see... so you choose to all die...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It worked! Now all we have to do is free his legs!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Oh, so that's how it was...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: 30 seconds! I won't last any longer than that.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's more than enough time I need!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There shouldn't be any fountain over there...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Which means that rubber brat is...!?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
